overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player walks under an overpass with color-changing LED walls, ascends stairs to a plaza with holographic advertisements, and continues through the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with dynamic LED lighting

events.description: LED wall shifts from green to blue to purple illumination
LED wall transitions to pink and yellow color tones

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: vertical LED panel wall cycling through green, blue, purple, and pink colors
large concrete overpass creating covered walkway
tall buildings covered with illuminated advertisements and holograms
asphalt road with reflective wet surface showing light trails from vehicles

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a concrete overpass along a sidewalk illuminated by a vibrant color-changing LED wall on the left. The wet road to the right reflects the neon lights of passing vehicles and distant digital billboards, while a few pedestrians approach from ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway transition from covered walkway to elevated plaza

events.description: approaching stairway entrance at end of covered walkway
beginning ascent of concrete stairs leading to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking toward and ascending the concrete stairs leading to the upper plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bag walking ahead toward the stairs
small child in yellow clothing walking with adult

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward
large structural support pillar painted yellow
yellow and white striped barriers along the road edge

segments.scene_description: Continuing past pedestrians toward a wide concrete stairway at the end of the covered walkway. The camera ascends the stairs, passing a large yellow support pillar, while construction barriers line the road to the right and the city skyline becomes more visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: reaching top of stairs and entering open plaza with holographic displays
descending stairs on the far side of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking across the plaza, observing the large holographic displays, then descending the stairs on the far side

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure standing at the top of the stairs ahead

entered.detail: massive floating holographic advertisement showing abstract orange and blue imagery
wide stairs with integrated blue neon lighting strips
tropical vegetation planted in the plaza
curved concrete seating with blue accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Emerging into an open plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in digital advertisements. A massive holographic display floats on the right, while illuminated stairs with blue neon accents lead downward. Palm trees and modern benches line the plaza as the camera descends to the lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower plaza walkway with commercial displays

events.description: reaching bottom of stairs and entering lower covered walkway
slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower plaza area past benches and digital kiosks

entered.detail: tall digital display showing animated advertisements
horizontal blue LED lighting along the wall
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a lower covered walkway illuminated by blue neon strips along the left wall. Digital advertising kiosks line the right side, while concrete benches sit beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding city lights as the path continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered, neon-lit underpass toward an open urban vista. It begins by walking along a sidewalk beneath a concrete overpass, where a vibrant color-changing LED wall casts shifting hues across the path and the wet road reflects the glow of passing vehicles. As the camera moves past a few approaching pedestrians, the enclosed walkway opens up toward a wide concrete stairway. The scene then shifts upward as the camera ascends the stairs, passing a large yellow support pillar and construction barriers that line the road. Finally, the perspective rises above the covered area, revealing the expansive city skyline stretching out ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive, high-altitude plaza down into a sheltered, neon-lit urban walkway. It begins by emerging into an open square dominated by towering skyscrapers and a massive floating holographic display, moving past palm trees and modern benches. As the camera descends a set of blue neon-accented stairs, the wide-open skyline gives way to a more enclosed environment. The scene then shifts into a covered lower walkway where blue neon strips line the left wall and digital kiosks flank the right. Finally, the camera glides forward over wet pavement that reflects the surrounding city lights beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge.
